w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.accessKeyId.Docs: Specifies the access key ID for S3 authentication.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.accessKeyId.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.buckets.Docs: A comma-delimited list of Amazon S3 buckets to be associated with the S3 authentication credentials.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.buckets.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.password.Docs: Specifies the password for basic authentication.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.password.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the type property is set to `"basic"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.secretKey.Docs: Specifies the secret key for S3 authentication.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.secretKey.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.type.Docs: Specifies whether the authentication scheme uses a user name and password ("basic") or an access key ID and secret key ("S3").  If you specify `"basic"`, specify the `username`, `password`, and `uris` properties.  If you specify `"S3"`, specify the `accessKeyId`, `secretKey`, and `buckets` (optional) properties.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.uris.Docs: A comma-delimited list of URIs to be associated with the basic authentication credentials. The authorization applies to the specified URIs and any more specific URI. For example, if you specify `http://www.example.com`, the authorization will also apply to `http://www.example.com/test`.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.uris.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"basic"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.username.Docs: Specifies the user name for basic authentication.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.username.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the type property is set to `"basic"`\.

w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.roleName.Docs: Describes the role for role-based authentication.  This role must be contained within the instance profile that's attached to the EC2 instance. An instance profile can only contain one IAM role.
w11339ab1c23c15c15c18c19.roleName.Required: Conditional\. Can be specified only if the `type` property is set to `"S3"`\.
